overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a white fur cloak walking through a fantastical autumn landscape. The scene features a dramatic red stormy sky with floating embers, the massive golden Erdtree in the distance, and transitions from under a stone arch through open grasslands to a stone cliff face.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone archway entrance to open field

events.description: character walks out from shadow of stone arch into the red-lit open landscape

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward from under the stone arch into the open field, passing dead bodies on the ground

entered.detail: large dark stone archway forming the entrance to the area
massive glowing golden tree dominating the distant skyline
tree with bright orange and gold foliage
tree with bright orange and gold foliage
fallen corpse lying in the grass
fallen corpse lying in the grass

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a dark stone archway with the character walking forward into a fantastical landscape. Dead bodies lie on the ground nearby as the character emerges from the shadow into an open field, revealing the massive golden Erdtree glowing in the distance against a dramatic sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with view of Erdtree

events.description: red stormy sky with floating embers becomes fully visible as camera pans left

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward the Erdtree, with the dramatic red sky visible to the left

entered.detail: dramatic crimson sky with floating red embers and clouds
pale crescent moon visible in the dark blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an open grassland with the massive Erdtree centered in the view. The sky reveals its dramatic crimson storm clouds with floating red embers, while a crescent moon hangs in the darker sky to the right. The lighting shifts to a warm, backlit glow from the red sky.

events.description: ambient light dims significantly as the sky darkens to deep red and purple tones

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the environment darkens, passing wooden fences on the left

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence posts lining the left side of the path
ancient stone wall ruins visible in the distance
large stone cliff face visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: As the sky darkens to deeper red and purple hues, the character walks along a dirt path bordered by a wooden fence on the left. Stone ruins become visible in the distance to the right, while a large cliff face begins to appear on the left horizon.

events.description: path leads to the base of a large stone cliff face on the left, creating a more enclosed corridor

agents.ego_description: walking along the base of the stone cliff, following the winding path through denser vegetation

segments.scene_description: The path becomes more enclosed as the character walks alongside the massive stone cliff face that now dominates the left side of the frame. The wooden fence disappears behind as the terrain becomes rockier and the vegetation denser, with the Erdtree still visible in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadow of a stone ruin into a vast, surreal autumn landscape dominated by a celestial glow. It begins under a dark stone archway, passing by fallen bodies as the character emerges from the gloom into an open field. As the camera moves forward, the view expands to reveal the massive, glowing golden Erdtree centered against a dramatic horizon. The scene then shifts into a wide grassland where the lighting transforms into a warm, backlit glow, highlighting crimson storm clouds filled with floating red embers and a crescent moon hanging in the darkening sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt path that transitions from an open rural landscape into a narrow corridor dominated by a massive stone cliff. It begins with the character walking beside a wooden fence under a sky deepening into red and purple hues, while stone ruins and a distant cliff face emerge on the horizon. As the character advances, the open terrain shifts and the wooden fence fades away, giving way to rockier ground and denser vegetation. The scene then closes in as the towering stone cliff face expands to dominate the left side of the frame, though the golden Erdtree remains visible in the far distance.
